name: Tithe Barn of the Faithful
text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{T}, Pay 1 life: Add {W} or {B}.
{3}, {T}, Remove two doom counters from the Doomsday Clock: You gain 5 life. The barn is full; the reckoning is, for now, postponed.
flavorText: Stocked for the end of days. The faithful overestimated how many beans the end of days would require.
